title: The Old Toy in the Closet

all.en: While cleaning out my bedroom closet, I discovered an old shoe box at the back.
all.zh: 我清理臥室衣櫃時，在最裡面發現一個舊鞋盒。

all.en: Inside it sat a small, faded teddy bear with one missing eye.
all.zh: 裡面放著一隻褪色的小泰迪熊，缺了一隻眼睛。

all.en: I had completely forgotten about him for at least fifteen years.
all.zh: 我已經整整忘記他至少十五年了。

all.en: My grandmother had sewn his red sweater by hand when I was four.
all.zh: 我四歲的時候，奶奶親手為他縫了那件紅毛衣。

all.en: Suddenly, memories of childhood bedtimes came flooding back to me.
all.zh: 突然間，童年睡前的記憶一下子湧上心頭。

all.en: I remembered crying when I lost him during a family trip to the beach.
all.zh: 我想起有次全家去海邊時把他弄丟了，我大哭了一場。

all.en: Apparently, my father had found him buried under some old blankets later.
all.zh: 顯然爸爸後來在一些舊毛毯下找到了他。

all.en: Sitting on the floor, I felt unexpectedly emotional and a little tearful.
all.zh: 我坐在地板上，感到出乎意料地激動，眼眶有些濕潤。

all.en: I gently brushed off the dust and placed him on my bookshelf.
all.zh: 我輕輕拍掉灰塵，把他放在書架上。

all.en: Tomorrow, I will buy a small button and sew his missing eye back on.
all.zh: 明天我要去買一顆小鈕扣，把他缺的眼睛縫回去。

all.en: Some objects, I realized, carry far more value than their price suggests.
all.zh: 我意識到，有些物品所承載的價值，遠遠超過它們的標價。

all.en: The next morning, I carefully searched a nearby craft shop for matching black buttons.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我仔細地在附近的手工藝店尋找相配的黑色鈕扣。

all.en: The shop owner kindly helped me select one that was the perfect size.
all.zh: 店主很親切地幫我挑選了一顆尺寸正好的鈕扣。

all.en: Back home, I threaded a fine needle and gently sewed the new eye on.
all.zh: 回到家後，我穿好細針，輕輕地把新眼睛縫了上去。

all.en: The teddy bear suddenly looked alive again, watching me from the bookshelf.
all.zh: 小熊忽然又像活了過來，從書架上靜靜地看著我。

all.en: I sent a photo of him to my grandmother, who lives across the country.
all.zh: 我把他的照片傳給住在國家另一端的奶奶。

all.en: She called me immediately, laughing and crying at the same time on the phone.
all.zh: 她立刻打電話來，在電話中又笑又哭。

all.en: We talked for nearly two hours about my childhood and her younger days.
all.zh: 我們聊了將近兩個小時，談我的童年和她年輕時的點滴。

all.en: She promised to knit him a new winter scarf to match his red sweater.
all.zh: 她答應要為他織一條新的冬季圍巾，搭配那件紅毛衣。

all.en: That weekend, I cleaned the entire closet and donated many forgotten items.
all.zh: 那個週末，我整理了整個衣櫃，把許多遺忘的物品捐了出去。

all.en: However, the teddy bear earned a permanent spot beside my favorite novels.
all.zh: 不過，這隻小熊得到了一個永久的位置，就在我最愛的小說旁邊。

all.en: A week later, my grandmother mailed the new winter scarf in a small box.
all.zh: 一週後，奶奶把那條新的冬季圍巾裝在小盒子裡寄了過來。

all.en: It was deep green with tiny snowflakes knitted along both narrow ends.
all.zh: 圍巾是深綠色的，兩端細窄處還織著小小的雪花圖案。

all.en: I wrapped it gently around the teddy bear's worn fluffy neck.
all.zh: 我把圍巾輕輕地圍在小熊那毛茸茸又磨損的脖子上。

all.en: He suddenly looked dressed for a proper Taiwanese winter afternoon.
all.zh: 他突然看起來像是穿戴整齊，準備迎接道地的台灣冬日午後。

all.en: My niece visited that weekend and immediately fell in love with him.
all.zh: 我的姪女那個週末來訪，立刻就愛上了這隻小熊。

all.en: She asked countless questions about his red sweater and missing eye.
all.zh: 她對他的紅毛衣和缺掉的眼睛問了無數個問題。

all.en: I told her the whole story while she sat quietly on my lap.
all.zh: 她安靜地坐在我腿上，我把整個故事都講給她聽。

all.en: Before leaving, she made me promise to lend her the bear someday.
all.zh: 離開前，她讓我答應有一天要把小熊借給她。

all.en: I agreed only if she would also love him with great care.
all.zh: 我同意了，但條件是她也要非常用心地愛護他。

all.en: Some childhood treasures, I learned, are meant to be quietly shared forward.
all.zh: 我體會到，有些童年的珍寶，是註定要靜靜地傳遞下去的。
